name: portfolio-jose-anthony
description: Portfolio — JOSE Anthony — Administrateur systèmes Linux

scripts.build:js: terser assets/js/main.js -o assets/js/main.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/components.js -o assets/js/components.min.js -c -m
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run build:rss && npm run build:sw
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html
scripts.watch: npm run watch:css & npm run watch:js
scripts.test:links: python3 -m http.server 8080 & sleep 1 && npx linkinator http://localhost:8080 --recurse --skip '^(?!http://localhost)' --timeout 10000 ; kill %1 2>/dev/null
